ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., single-elimination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "university" TEXT /* University the team represents */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in (e.g., Division I) */,
  "season_record" TEXT /* Season record (e.g., 5-2-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament this round belongs to */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round (e.g., Prelims, Finals) */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of the round (e.g., Preliminary, Playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round this game belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 160 - 170) */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Referee overseeing the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team this statistic belongs to */,
  "ten_point_answers" INTEGER /* Number of 10-point answers */,
  "minus_five_answers" INTEGER /* Number of -5 point answers */,
  "ppb" REAL /* Points per bonus */,
  "power_answers" INTEGER /* Number of power (15-point) answers */,
  "bonus_points" INTEGER /* Total bonus points earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packets" (
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet */,
  "packet_name" TEXT /* Name of the packet (e.g., Oxford + Duke) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the packet */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the packet (e.g., Easy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_packets" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet used in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Tournament Director) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: Division the team is in (e.g., Division I)
